title: centaurea tardiflora
intro: Centaurea tardiflora is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and feathery foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Centaurea tardiflora include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Centaurea tardiflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
